title: helemonium canescens
intro: Helemonium canescens, also known as Heliotropium, is a flowering plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Heliotropium include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing coughs and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Heliotropium can be found in teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to soothe and calm irritated skin and respiratory issues.
